mapper.select:
SELECT cpi.*, cu.nickname createByName,cpd.id processDefinitionId, cpd.process_name processDefinitionName FROM cat_process_instance cpi INNER JOIN cat_user cu on cpi.create_by = cu.id INNER JOIN cat_process_definition cpd on cpi.process_definition_id = cpd.id
cpi.deleted = '0' AND cpi.id = #{id}
